mapper.sql: id, user_id, parent_id, filename, file_path, file_size, file_type, is_folder, storage_type, status, identifier, team_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_info (user_id, parent_id, filename, file_path, file_size, file_type, is_folder, storage_type, status, identifier, team_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{parentId}, #{filename}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{isFolder}, #{storageType}, 0, #{identifier}, #{teamId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM file_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY is_folder DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM file_info WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY is_folder DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM file_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND filename = #{filename} AND status = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM file_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND filename LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND status = 0
